name: COLORado Solo Edge 3
comment: This low-profile 1-meter IP65-rated RGBwWL LED footlight projects high-quality white light and a full range of color through a single-source lens designed to produce smooth, even output. Featuring fully-controllable RGB marker lights that can be used to cue talent or mark the edge of a stage, seamless end-to-end alignment, and a covered display, this elegant fixture also comes with a stealth filter that enables it to disappear when off.
